description_long: This is a compact, tracked military tank with a dark green exterior and a cylindrical turret mounted centrally on the hull. The vehicle features a prominent cannon extending from the front of the turret, and several hatches and access panels are visible on the upper surfaces. The tank's body is angular, with sloped armor plating on the front and sides, and it rides on a set of six road wheels per side, connected by a continuous metal track. On the rear, there is a cylindrical external storage container and a rectangular engine compartment. The tank displays a small, rectangular insignia with a red sunburst on the turret sides. The overall finish is matte, with visible wear and subtle surface texture, suggesting heavy use.
description: A compact, dark green tracked military tank with a central turret, front-mounted cannon, and visible insignia on the turret sides. The vehicle features sloped armor, six road wheels per side, and a matte, worn finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped frontal armor, central turret with cannon, and the tank's tracks and road wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the tracks, the turret with cannon, and the sunburst insignia on the turret.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the engine compartment, cylindrical storage container, and the back of the turret.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the tracks, turret with cannon, and another sunburst insignia on the turret.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the front of the turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped steel armor plating on the front, sides, and turret; thickness appears moderate, with no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green paint with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: Rectangular red sunburst insignia on both sides of the turret; no other visible markings.
